title: Artificial Green Wall Panel 50cm x 100cm for Indoor and Outdoor Use, Faux Plant Living Wall for Home Garden Office Shop Café Wedding Decor (C)
features: Seamless Modular Panels:Create a personalized green wall with interlocking panels that fit together securely. Perfect for any layout, indoor or outdoor, and easily expandable
Safe for All Spaces:Crafted from non-toxic, allergy-safe materials, making it completely safe for pets and children. No pollen, harsh smells, or chemicals
Year-Round Durability:Built to withstand sun, rain, and humidity without fading or damage. A reliable solution for balconies, bathrooms, gardens, and more
Lifelike Botanical Appeal:Features dense greenery and subtle color accents that bring depth and freshness to any space—no watering or trimming required
Easy DIY Setup:Installs effortlessly on wood, brick, or drywall. Flexible design conforms to curved surfaces—no tools or special skills needed

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Home Decor, Garden Decor, Office Decor, Event Decor, Photography Props
